metadata.title: Thai mission learning output template specs
metadata.purpose: Generator specification for Kakao cards, PWA lessons, Saturday teaching decks, teacher scripts, and printable review sheets.

brandDirection.tone: warm, mission-centered, practical, relational, easy for average-age Korean learners
brandDirection.visualDirection: bright natural light, real people, church visit, greeting, meal sharing, prayer, praise, community warmth
forbiddenDirection: images that visually conflict with church, family, meal, greeting, prayer, or praise settings

imagePolicy.goal: Every learning output should include a relevant image when it helps memory, context, or warmth.
preferredImageTypes: real photo of greeting, church entrance, meal table, prayer, praise, family, friends, or caring conversation
clean object photo for practical nouns like restroom, meal, name tag, or church bulletin
simple documentary-style scene that matches the lesson story
fallbackImageTypes: softly staged stock photo with clear human action
AI-generated realistic scene based on the lesson story
selectionRules: Choose one primary image per day that matches the day's story and missionGoal.
Choose supporting keyword images only for nouns or actions that benefit from direct visual memory.
Prefer people-centered photos for sentence learning and object-centered photos for keyword learning.
Never use an image only as decoration; it must support memory, scene recall, or speaking confidence.
If a lesson includes prayer, blessing, or praise, choose gentle and respectful church or community imagery instead of dramatic symbolic art.
imagePolicy.altTextRule: Every generated image asset must have short Korean alt text describing the visible scene and its learning purpose.
defaultAvoidList: overly Western-only church cues when a Thai context is intended
visual clutter that hides the learning focus

kakaoCard.target: weekday and sunday shareable mobile card

sections.name: heroImage
sections.notes: Use the day's story scene. Image occupies top 40 percent.

sections.name: newPhrases
sections.notes: Show Korean, Thai, Korean pronunciation. Maximum 2 main sentence rows.

sections.name: reviewStrip
sections.notes: Short chip-style line with 1 to 4 review expressions.

sections.name: keywordStrip
sections.notes: Show 2 to 4 major words with tiny icons or thumbnails.

imageRules.style: friendly, documentary, easy to recognize on phone

scope.saturdayReason: Saturday uses the offline PPT and teacher script pack instead of a Kakao card in version 1.

sundayFormat.rule: Sunday cards use the same mobile card renderer as weekdays, but emphasize review phrases and personalMission instead of newPhrases.

contentSource.phrases: Sunday schedule reviewVariantIds rendered as reviewPhrases; show all assigned review phrases when the lesson is configured as a full weekend repeat.
contentSource.keywords: Sunday schedule keyWordIds filtered through displayKeywords; show enough core keywords to support the full repeat flow.
contentSource.missionText: Sunday personalMission rendered as the main action box.
contentSource.ministryGuide: Sunday ministryGuide rendered as the relational guide line.

pageSections.name: todaySentences
pageSections.notes: Each sentence card includes male/female toggle, normal/slow/repeat3 controls, Thai text, Korean, romanization, Korean pronunciation.

pageSections.name: keywords
pageSections.notes: Show image when helpful, especially concrete nouns and action verbs.

imageRules.minimumUsefulImageRule: If the story describes a place, action, meal, or object, include at least one photo.
imageRules.thumbnailStrategy: Keyword images should be square thumbnails with consistent crop.

statePolicy.fallback: If localStorage is unavailable, keep the lesson usable with stateless navigation and show no blocking error.

learnerProfile.ageRange: primarily older Korean adults; source plan average age about 58

imageMissingFallback.visualStyle: light neutral panel with scene label; preserve image aspect ratio so layout does not shift when real image is added

audioSpeedControlPlacement.reason: Older learners should not have to find a settings screen to slow down audio.

slides.name: corePhrases
slides.notes: Large Thai text with Korean pronunciation and Korean meaning.

slides.name: keywordAndImage
slides.notes: Use 3 to 4 key words with picture support.

imageRules.preferredStyle: large full-bleed or wide photo with minimal clutter

imageUsage.notesRule: Each image used in the PPT should have one short note telling the teacher why it helps memory or scene recall.

contextHeader.purpose: Make each Saturday script usable by a rotating teacher without prior context.

imageRules.printRule: Images must remain readable in grayscale and low-ink print mode.

imageSceneLibrary.description: Korean mission team greeting Thai church member at church entrance with warm smile and wai
imageSceneLibrary.altTextKo: 교회 입구에서 태국 성도에게 와이 인사로 반갑게 인사하는 장면

imageSceneLibrary.description: Two people meeting after worship, introducing names with gentle eye contact
imageSceneLibrary.altTextKo: 예배 후 처음 만나 이름을 묻고 자기소개하는 장면

imageSceneLibrary.description: asking where the restroom is: one person politely asking, another person pointing helpfully
imageSceneLibrary.altTextKo: 교회 안에서 화장실 위치를 정중하게 묻는 장면

imageSceneLibrary.description: Thai church meal table, people sharing food and smiling, friendly fellowship
imageSceneLibrary.altTextKo: 교회 식사 자리에서 음식을 나누며 대화하는 장면

imageSceneLibrary.description: gentle encouragement and blessing: two adults speaking warmly, one encouraging the other, caring expression
imageSceneLibrary.altTextKo: 교회 안에서 사랑과 축복의 말을 따뜻하게 전하는 장면

imageSceneLibrary.description: Supportive prayer moment between church members, respectful and calm
imageSceneLibrary.altTextKo: 상대를 위로하며 기도해 주겠다고 말하는 장면

imageSceneLibrary.description: Small church group invited to sing praise together, warm and joyful atmosphere
imageSceneLibrary.altTextKo: 작은 교회 모임에서 함께 찬양하도록 초대하는 장면

imageSceneLibrary.description: full review roleplay for mission conversation: small group practicing greeting, introduction, prayer support, and praise invitation in a friendly roleplay
imageSceneLibrary.altTextKo: 처음 만남부터 기도와 찬양 초대까지 전체 흐름을 역할극으로 복습하는 장면

generatorChecklist: Load thai_curriculum_master.json first, then join sentence and keyword data from thai_learning_assets_index.json.
For every output, confirm all referenced variant IDs and keyword IDs exist.
Attach at least one relevant image to each weekday card or lesson when the story has a visible scene.
Use ministryGuide as a positive relational guide, never as a warning that shuts down mission use.
Show male and female Thai outputs clearly wherever the learner needs to speak aloud.
Use Korean as the primary support language and keep sentences visually large for average-age learners.
Prefer one strong scene image over many small decorative images.
